name: Snowpeas with Red Bell Pepper
recipeIngredient: 1/2 red bell pepper, seeded and sliced
1/3 pound snow peas, trimmed and washed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Stir in the garlic and red bell pepper and cook for 1 minute.
3. Stir in the snowpeas and toss to mix.
4. Add water and cover.
5. Cook for 3 minutes or until the snowpeas are just tender.
